data.title: UK approves BlackRock to operate as a crypto asset firm in the country, Galaxy Digital gets derivatives trading license
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BlackRock has been approved by the UK Financial Conduct Authority to operate as a crypto asset company in the country, and Galaxy Digital's London office has been licensed to conduct derivatives trading. Since 2020, companies conducting certain crypto asset activities in the UK must comply with revised money laundering, terrorist financing and funds transfer regulations and register with the FCA. There are currently 51 companies on the crypto asset register, including Coinbase, Fidelity, Gemini and Kraken. Due to the FCA's strict approval process, only about 14% of applications are approved. (The Block)

data.title: Source: General Counsel Kalshi to join US government efficiency department DOGE
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that crypto journalist Eleanor Terrett wrote on the X platform that sources revealed that Eliezer Mishory, chief regulatory officer and general counsel of the prediction market Kalshi, will leave and join the DOGE team of the U.S. government's Department of Efficiency.

data.title: PayPal Expands Cryptocurrency Support in the U.S.
data.description: According to Odaily, PayPal has expanded its cryptocurrency offerings for U.S. users by adding support for SOL and LINK. This move allows American customers to buy, sell, and hold these digital currencies on the platform, further integrating cryptocurrencies into mainstream financial services.

data.title: Mexican President Rules Out Retaliatory Tariffs
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum announced that the country will not implement retaliatory tariff measures. This statement comes amid ongoing discussions about trade policies and economic strategies. The decision reflects Mexico's approach to maintaining stable international trade relations.

data.title: PayPal adds support for SOL and LINK for users in the US market
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to market news: Payment giant PayPal has added support for SOL and LINK for users in the US market.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 86,000 USDT with a 1.84% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 02, 2025, 15:04 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 86,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 86,029.890625 USDT, with a narrowed 1.84% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Retail giant 7-Eleven launches South Korea’s central bank digital currency test
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Retail giant 7-Eleven (7-11) announced the launch of the South Korean central bank's digital currency test. Currently, customers who have opened an account with one of the seven partner banks, including Korea Kookmin Bank, Shinhan Bank and Woori Bank, can pay for goods by scanning the QR code in the digital wallet at checkout. To encourage participation, during the trial period, 7-Eleven offers a 10% discount for all products purchased with digital currency. (CoinDesk)

data.title: U.S. Democratic lawmakers ask the SEC to preserve the correspondence records of Trump family's crypto project WLFI
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news: US Democratic lawmakers asked the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to keep records of letters from Trump and his family's crypto business World Liberty Financial. Due to the Trump family's business in cryptocurrency, US lawmakers are worried about Trump's influence on regulators. (Jinshi)

data.title: VanEck Launches New Exchange-Traded Product Tracking Celestia's TIA
data.description: According to Foresight News, VanEck has introduced a new exchange-traded product on Euronext Amsterdam and Euronext Paris, which tracks Celestia's native token, TIA. This exchange-traded note offers investors the opportunity to invest without directly owning the underlying asset.

data.title: ARK Invest's ETF transferred 1,097 BTC to Coinbase, worth $94.06 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Arkham monitoring data, about 3 minutes ago, ARK Invest's exchange-traded fund ARKB 21Shres Bitcoin ETF transferred 1,097 BTC to the Coinbase marked address, with a value of approximately US$94.06 million.
